wincon_primary: Overwhelm opponents with an army of goblin tokens created by Krenko's activated ability, then attack for lethal with mass pump effects
wincon_backup: Purphoros, God of the Forge / Impact Tremors etb damage triggers; Goblin combo lines with Skirk Prospector + sacrifices

wincon_primary: Snowball aggressive advantage by triggering Winota's ability with non-Human attackers, cheating Humans into play for free each combat
wincon_backup: Stax effects (Drannith Magistrate, Archon of Emeria) slowing opponents while beatdown continues; Kiki-Jiki combo lines

wincon_primary: Generate infinite mana via Basalt Monolith / Grim Monolith combos with Kinnan's ability, then activate Kinnan repeatedly to dump all creatures onto the battlefield
wincon_backup: Thassa's Oracle + Demonic Consultation / Tainted Pact; Walking Ballista as infinite mana outlet; Finale of Devastation for X=large

wincon_primary: Generate infinite mana through Urza's ability + artifact untappers (Isochron Scepter + Dramatic Reversal), then cast entire deck with Urza's activated ability
wincon_backup: Thassa's Oracle + Demonic Consultation; Hullbreaker Horror infinite mana loops; Winter Orb / Static Orb hard lock with Urza breaking parity

wincon_primary: Ultimate planeswalkers after accumulating loyalty counters via Atraxa's proliferate ability (Superfriends strategy)
wincon_backup: Infect/toxic proliferation (Blighted Agent, Viral Drake) as alt win; +1/+1 counter combat damage; Darksteel Reactor alt win

wincon_primary: Establish hard stax lock (Winter Orb, Static Orb, Stasis effects) while breaking parity with Arbiter's cost reduction, win through concession or slow combat
wincon_backup: Approach of the Second Sun; Azor's Elocutors; Rest in Peace + Helm of Obedience combo; Luminarch Ascension beats
